Metadata.title: India Med Service | Medical Treatment in India
Metadata.description: India Med Service — connect with top hospitals & expert doctors in India. Affordable surgery, medical visa support, and complete care for international patients.
Metadata.keywords: India Med Service, India Med, medical treatment India, best hospitals India, medical tourism India, surgery India, medical visa India

Hero.heading_main: Affordable Medical Treatment in India with
Hero.description: Looking for medical treatment in India? We help you compare treatment costs in India, choose top hospitals and get complete visa & patient support.

WhyChooseUs.title: Why Choose Us?
WhyChooseUs.header_desc: Trusted by international patients worldwide, India delivers advanced healthcare backed by expert doctors and complete care support.
WhyChooseUs.reason_1_desc: JCI & NABH accredited hospitals ensuring top global safety and care.
WhyChooseUs.reason_2_desc: Up to 70–80% lower treatment costs compared to Western countries.
WhyChooseUs.reason_3_desc: Internationally trained specialists with years of proven expertise.
WhyChooseUs.reason_4_desc: End-to-end support: travel, visa, treatment, and recovery care.

hospitals.medanta_desc: World-class multi-super specialty hospital known for advanced cardiac and robotic surgeries.
hospitals.fortis_desc: Premium quaternary care hospital with state-of-the-art medical technology and international standards.
hospitals.artemis_desc: First JCI & NABH accredited hospital in Gurgaon, providing depth of expertise in advanced medical interventions.
hospitals.max_desc: Renowned for oncology, cardiology, and neurosciences with top-tier healthcare professionals.
hospitals.paras_desc: Leader in neurosciences and joint replacement, providing specialized care at accessible price points.
hospitals.marengo_desc: Modern multi-specialty facility offering high-end clinical care and a patient-centric approach.
hospitals.indiamed_lucknow_desc: Spread across an area of 12.58 acres, Medanta Lucknow is one of the largest multi-super-specialty hospitals.
hospitals.jay_prabha_desc: Established in 2020, this super-specialty hospital began operations with an Out-Patient Department (OPD).

FeaturedDestination.title: Featured Destination
FeaturedDestination.desc: Trusted by international patients worldwide, India delivers advanced healthcare backed by expert doctors, modern facilities, and complete care and support at every step of the treatment journey.

ModelOfCare.title: India Med Model of Care
ModelOfCare.step_1_desc: India Med delivers high-quality, integrated care through expert clinicians, a doctor-led approach, and strong multispecialty collaboration.
ModelOfCare.step_2_desc: India Med provides advanced infrastructure, high OT & ICU capacity, and strict infection control to support complex care and faster patient recovery.
ModelOfCare.step_3_desc: India Med delivers advanced tertiary and quaternary care using cutting-edge technology, enabling doctors to perform complex diagnostics and treatments with precision.
ModelOfCare.step_4_desc: India Med uses advanced digital solutions to improve access and quality of care, supported by uniform clinical standards that ensure safe, effective treatment.
ModelOfCare.step_5_desc: India Med delivers advanced healthcare through integrated centres of excellence, combining care, research, and learning with a patient-first philosophy.

Leadership.title: Leadership
Leadership.faisal_title: Founder & Managing Director – India Med Service
Leadership.faisal_bio_1: Mr. Faisal Iqbal is the Founder and Director of India Med Service, a trusted medical facilitation company specializing in organizing treatment for international patients in India. With over 6 years of experience in the healthcare coordination sector, he has successfully assisted more than 1,750 patients from various countries in accessing high-quality medical care.
Leadership.faisal_bio_2: He is highly experienced in coordinating end-to-end medical journeys, including hospital selection, doctor consultations, treatment planning, and patient support. Mr. Faisal personally ensures smooth communication between patients, hospitals, and medical professionals.
Leadership.faisal_bio_3: Under his leadership, India Med Service has built strong collaborations with leading hospitals and specialists across India, delivering reliable, transparent, and patient-focused services.
Leadership.daniyar_bio: Daniyar Aydimirov oversees patient coordination in Kazakhstan, providing dedicated support to international patients. He has assisted over 1,000 patients and ensures smooth communication in Russian, Kazakh, and Uzbek, with a strong focus on patient care and trust.
achievements_list: 6+ years of experience in medical facilitation
Strong network with top hospitals across India

FAQ.title: FAQs
FAQ.subtitle: Frequently asked questions
FAQ.book_desc: If you have any questions, just book a 15-minute call with us.
FAQ.q1: How does India Med help with medical treatments?
FAQ.a1: India Med connects you with top-tier healthcare providers, helps compare treatment options, and provides support throughout your medical journey.
FAQ.q2: What specialties does India Med cover?
FAQ.a2: We cover a wide range of specialties including Cardiology, Oncology, Orthopedics, and more.
FAQ.q3: How can I get a treatment quote?
FAQ.a3: You can upload your medical reports through our portal, and our experts will provide a detailed cost estimate within 24-48 hours.
FAQ.q4: Does India Med offer international patient services?
FAQ.a4: Yes, we provide full concierge services including visa assistance, airport transfers, and language interpretation.
FAQ.q5: How do I schedule an appointment with a doctor?
FAQ.a5: Simply book a call through our website or use the appointment feature to select your preferred specialist.

PrivacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPolicy.intro: Welcome to India Med Service. Your privacy is important to us, and we are committed to protecting the personal information you share with us through our website, services, consultations, and communication channels. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, store, and protect your information when you visit or use our website and medical assistance services. By accessing or using our website, you agree to the terms outlined in this Privacy Policy.

who_we_are.title: Who We Are
who_we_are.content: India Med Service is a healthcare assistance and medical tourism platform dedicated to helping patients connect with hospitals, doctors, healthcare providers, and medical services across India. We assist domestic and international patients in finding suitable medical treatments, consultations, and healthcare support.

info_collect.title: Information We Collect
info_collect.content: We may collect different types of personal and non-personal information depending on how you interact with our website and services.

subsections.title: Personal Information
subsections.content: When you contact us, submit an inquiry, request a consultation, or fill out any form on our website, we may collect:
items: Medical History or Health Information voluntarily shared by you
Passport details (for international patient assistance if required)

subsections.title: Non-Personal Information
subsections.content: We may automatically collect technical and usage information including:

usage.title: How We Use Your Information
usage.content: The information collected may be used for the following purposes:
items: To respond to inquiries and consultation requests
To connect patients with hospitals, doctors, or healthcare providers
To arrange medical appointments and treatment coordination
To improve our website performance and user experience
To provide customer support and assistance
To send important updates or service-related communication
To process international patient support and travel coordination
To maintain security and prevent fraudulent activity
usage.footer: We only use your information for legitimate healthcare assistance and service-related purposes.

disclaimer.title: Medical Information Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: Any medical information shared through our website is treated with confidentiality. However, India Med Service is not a hospital, diagnostic center, or licensed medical practitioner. The information provided on our website is intended for general informational purposes only and should not be considered medical advice. Medical decisions should always be made in consultation with qualified healthcare professionals.

sharing.title: Sharing of Information
sharing.content: We do not sell, rent, or trade your personal information to third parties. However, we may share relevant information with:
items: Doctors or specialists involved in your treatment coordination
Visa or travel support partners when required
Technology and hosting service providers that support our operations
sharing.footer: Any information shared is limited to what is necessary for delivering healthcare assistance services.

cookies.title: Cookies Policy
cookies.content: Our website may use cookies and similar technologies to enhance user experience and analyze website traffic. Cookies help us:
cookies.footer: You may choose to disable cookies through your browser settings. However, some website features may not function properly if cookies are disabled.

security.title: Data Security
security.content: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your information against unauthorized access, misuse, disclosure, or loss. While we strive to use commercially acceptable security measures, no method of internet transmission or electronic storage is completely secure. Therefore, we cannot guarantee absolute security.

links.title: Third-Party Links
links.content: Our website may contain links to third-party websites, hospitals, or healthcare providers. We are not responsible for the privacy practices, content, or policies of external websites. We encourage users to review the privacy policies of third-party websites before sharing any personal information.

international.title: International Patients
international.content: If you are accessing our services from outside India, you understand and agree that your information may be processed and stored in India. By using our services, you consent to the transfer and processing of your information in accordance with this Privacy Policy.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.content: Depending on applicable laws, you may have the right to:
items: Request restriction of certain data usage
rights.footer: To exercise these rights, please contact us using the information provided below.

children.title: Children’s Privacy
children.content: Our services are not directed toward children under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children without parental or guardian consent. If you believe a child has provided us with personal information, please contact us immediately.

changes.title: Changes to This Privacy Policy
changes.content: India Med Service reserves the right to update or modify this Privacy Policy at any time without prior notice. Any changes will be posted on this page along with the updated effective date. Continued use of our website after modifications indicates acceptance of the revised policy.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: If you have any questions, concerns, or requests regarding this Privacy Policy or your personal information, please contact us:
contact.footer:
India Med Service
Email: info@indiamedservice.com
Website: https://indiamedservice.com

We are committed to protecting your privacy and maintaining the confidentiality of your information.
